installCommand: if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then npm ci --no-audit --no-fund; else cd pup-focus && npm ci --no-audit --no-fund; fi
buildCommand: if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then npm run build && cp .next/routes-manifest.json .next/routes-manifest-deterministic.json; else cd pup-focus && npm run build && rm -rf ../.next && mkdir -p ../.next && cp -R .next/. ../.next/ && cp .next/routes-manifest.json ../.next/routes-manifest-deterministic.json; fi
